elements.text: major chemicals frequently present in wwTP efuents, which also show high toxicities. Kadokami et al. (1995) reported a technique for the simultaneous determination of 266 chemicals in water using GC/MS, an advanced chemical measurement, with more confined categories, should be suggested based on the frequency of detection and the degree of toxicity. Consequently, the biological method (i.e., WET testing), which measures the potential and real toxicity of mixed chemicals, should be used for monitoring the toxicity of wwTP effuents containing various hazardous chemicals.
